summary.lv: Aerones Engineering, vēja turbīnu robotizēto apkopju pakalpojumu sniedzējs pasaulē, meklē jaunāko datu ievades operatoru Rīgas birojam.
summary.en: Aerones Engineering — the world's leading provider of robotic wind-turbine maintenance — is hiring a Junior Data Entry Operator for its Riga office.
